title: GitHub OAuth
description: Configure one or more GitHub identity providers for OpenShift OAuth. Credentials are loaded from Vault by external secret name at apply time.

hostname.title: Hostname
hostname.description: Optional GitHub Enterprise hostname. Leave empty to use github.com.

mappingMethod.title: Mapping Method
mappingMethod.description: OpenShift identity mapping method for rendered GitHub providers.

secretNamespace.title: Secret Namespace
secretNamespace.description: Namespace where OAuth client secret objects should be created.

providers.title: Providers
providers.description: GitHub identity providers to render into OpenShift OAuth configuration.

name.title: Provider Name
name.description: Identity provider name as it will appear on the OpenShift login screen.

secretName.title: Secret Name
secretName.description: Kubernetes secret name that stores the OAuth client secret in the cluster.

externalSecretName.title: External Secret Name
externalSecretName.description: Vault secret name under secret/openshift/ with username=clientId and password=clientSecret.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.description: GitHub organizations allowed to authenticate through this provider.

teams.title: Teams
teams.description: GitHub teams allowed to authenticate through this provider.
